completed_tasks.name: Remove console.log and standardize pragmas to ^0.8.19

remaining_tasks.name: Remove commented-out network blocks from hardhat.config.ts

decisions.rationale: Phase 1 tasks are straightforward — no design decisions needed for console.log removal, pragma standardization, and config cleanup
Tasks are well-understood refactors — removing console.log import, changing pragma lines, deleting commented-out config blocks
opencode Task tool does not support worktree isolation; Plan 01-01 also touches the contracts/gnus-ai submodule which further prevents worktree use

next_action: Execute Plan 01-02: remove all commented-out network configuration blocks from hardhat.config.ts, then update STATE.md and ROADMAP.md
context_notes: Plan 01-01 completed successfully (RED/GREEN commits, SUMMARY.md committed). Plan 01-02 is the only remaining work in this phase. It's a single file change — removing 11 commented-out network blocks from hardhat.config.ts while preserving all 8 active networks. The executor subagent for 01-01 aborted mid-execution, but the work was already committed. Uncommitted config.json and yarn.lock are environment-specific — they should be committed or discarded before executing 01-02.
